CommunityApplications.Profile: Community-maintained Unraid/Docker packaging of yanshay's SpoolEase Custom Bambu Studio — a web-accessible, containerized build of Bambu Studio with integrated SpoolEase filament management. The slicer and SpoolEase are the work of yanshay (https://github.com/yanshay); this repository only packages that work into a container. For support with the slicer or SpoolEase itself, use the SpoolEase project channels. For packaging/container issues, use this repository's issues.
